action.reasoning: Observation: Best eval score 0.5777, local test 90% success. With 4 iterations left, need targeted improvements. Analysis: The score formula S_i*(300/d_i) means successful episodes with 450m distance score only 0.667 each. Need to reduce travel distance AND improve success rate. Key improvements: 1) When utility>0, pick neighbor with best utility/distance ratio (already doing this), 2) Better last-mile: when explored_rate>0.95, switch to aggressive frontier-following, 3) Reduce oscillation by tracking recent positions and penalizing revisits. Decision: Rewrite planner with cleaner logic, better frontier navigation, and submit eval.
